reviews.comment:
Buena atención pero tienen que tener mayor cuidado cuando sacan el surtidor, me mojo todo el tanque de mi moto con nafta, ni disculpas ni limpiarlo ofrecieron

(Translated by Google)
The service was good, but they need to be more careful when removing the pump. It soaked my entire motorcycle tank with gasoline, and they didn't even apologize or offer to clean it.

reviews.comment:
Estuve leyendo todas las reseñas y me di cuenta que no fui el único que tuvo una mala experiencia con un encargado o algo así, un viejo de ahí dentro, no un playero. Te trata re mal, te verduguea, te dice que no servís como cliente. Yo llegué y estuve esperando un par de minutos (no llegue a los 5 minutos) así pedía algo con un amigo... La verdad, que mal momento me hizo pasar...

(Translated by Google)
I was reading all the reviews and realized I wasn't the only one who had a bad experience with a manager or something like that, an old guy inside, not a gas station attendant. He treats you terribly, harasses you, tells you you're not good enough as a customer. I arrived and waited a couple of minutes (less than 5 minutes) so I could order something with a friend... Honestly, he made me feel awful...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11544579934196333833/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqeFBubnVRRRAB
